zh.lifeSummary: William de Percy是Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth和Isabel de Brus的兒子，於1192年出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。他於大約1215年與Joan de Briwere在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1245年7月12日在英國越可爾克雷文享年53歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾薩利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William de Percy是Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth和Isabel de Brus的儿子，于1192年出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。他于大约1215年与Joan de Briwere在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1245年7月12日在英国越可爾克雷文享年53岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾薩利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: William de Percy was born in 1192, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England as the son of Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth and Isabel de Brus. He married Joan de Briwere about 1215, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 12 July 1245, in Craven, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Sawley, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: William de Percy est né en 1192, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, fils de Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth et Isabel de Brus. Il a épousé Joan de Briwere environ 1215, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 juillet 1245, à Craven, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Sawley, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: William de Percy wurde 1192 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, als Sohn von Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth und Isabel de Brus geboren. Er hat um 1215 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England Joan de Briwere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Juli 1245 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Craven, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Sawley, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William de Percy è nato il nel 1192 nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England come figlio di Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth e Isabel de Brus. Lui sposato Joan de Briwere circa 1215, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 12 luglio 1245, nel Craven, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Sawley, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Percyは1192年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックでHenry de Percy I, Lord of PetworthとIsabel de Brusの息子として生まれた。約1215年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックでJoan de Briwereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1245年7月12日にイギリスヨークシュアイアクラベンで53歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアサウリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Percy(은)는 1192년 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth(와)과 Isabel de Brus의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1215년 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 Joan de Briwere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1245년 7월 12일 영국 요르크실르 크레이븐에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 사w리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William de Percy nasceu em 1192, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra filho de Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth e Isabel de Brus. Ele casou-se com Joan de Briwere aproximadamente 1215, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de julho de 1245, em Craven, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Sawley, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: William de Percy родился в 1192 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия. Его родителей звали Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth и Isabel de Brus. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Briwere около 1215 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 12 июля 1245 г. в местности кравен, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности савли, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: William de Percy nació en 1192, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra como hijo de Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth y Isabel de Brus. Se casó con Joan de Briwere aproximadamente 1215, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de julio de 1245, en Craven, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Sawley, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
